headline: Malaysia Targets Ambitious $107B Investment to Boost Semiconductor Sector
summary: Malaysia is set to attract $107 billion in investments for its semiconductor sector, according to Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim. Major firms like Intel and Infineon have already made significant investments, bolstering Malaysia's semiconductor industry.
